title: Form field is required but won't populate on the board
excerpt: I have a Form with a required status field, but it’s not populating on the Main Board.  When the form is submitted, the item creates properly, except this one status field.

posts.author: shawn.yarnold (Shawn Yarnold)
posts.cookedHtml: I have a Form with a required status field, but it’s not populating on the Main Board. When the form is submitted, the item creates properly, except this one status field.

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @shawn.yarnold - that seems odd. Do you have a default value on the board or automation set that would override the column on item creation? If not, I would send this into support@monday.com to see if they can assist.
Mark
https://www.greenllamas.com
